title: Sandbox Execution Environments
learning_outcomes: Explain containerized runtimes and isolated python interpreters.

content_sections.title: Containerization and Isolated Interpreters
content_sections.content:
Allowing agents to execute code on host systems creates severe security risks (e.g. data theft or system deletion). 

To mitigate this, agents run code inside **sandboxed execution environments** (e.g. Docker containers or microVMs). The interpreter has no access to the host filesystem, network, or environment variables. File read-write actions are strictly bounded to a temporary sandbox directory.
